title: skopeo 1.23.0 default policy.json is broken in homebrew (macos)
body:
skopeo 1.22.2 allowed overriding the default path with a compile time option.

https://github.com/podman-container-tools/skopeo/blob/75bc19e334b85b4901cac5cc2f3bfb458f7b94e2/vendor/go.podman.io/image/v5/signature/policy_config.go#L32

```
==> go build -trimpath -o=/opt/homebrew/Cellar/skopeo/1.22.2/bin/skopeo -tags=containers_image_ostree_stub exclude_graphdriver_btrfs  -ldflags=-X main.gitCommit= -X go.podman.io/image/v5/docker.systemRegistriesDirPath=/opt/homebrew/etc/containers/registries.d -X go.podman.io/image/v5/internal/tmpdir.unixTempDirForBigFiles=/var/tmp -X go.podman.io/image/v5/signature.systemDefaultPolicyPath=/opt/homebrew/etc/containers/policy.json -X go.podman.io/image/v5/pkg/sysregistriesv2.systemRegistriesConfPath=/opt/homebrew/etc/containers/registries.conf ./cmd/skopeo
```

Homebrew still builds skopeo with that option, but it no longer works because of this:
https://github.com/podman-container-tools/container-libs/commit/43a7fd693784498d5bafe55f24673e7bad981e74


I am unsure if I have more time to look at this, but, is there a suggested mechanism that homebrew can add to the package that will set the default policy path back to `/opt/homebrew/etc/containers/policy.json` ?

For more info, see: https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/issues/286125#issuecomment-4616652693

comments.body:
Thanks for your report. (Previously: #787 ). Given the history, we should have remembered to let Homebrew know.

As you found out, there is now a new compile-time override.

It looks like it's fixed for now with: https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/pull/286256

I'm mostly a skopeo user (so I proposed an extremely blunt fix). It's entirely possible the package needs a bit of reassessment. The previous tests _did_ trip on this change in behaviour, but I think there was enough confusion to make the assumption that the error message has "just changed" for mac.

In particular, I don't know the answer to which build options are still current and which ones can be removed. I'm OK with this issue getting closed regardless of whether skopeo folks engage with homebrew on this.

> In particular, I don't know the answer to which build options are still current and which ones can be removed. I

https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/pull/286256#discussion_r3356902947 .
Thanks for your input there! Good luck!
